'''鈭歷-t-dh-y''' ('''kavatdheyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:erotise|erotise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-t-dh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:erotise|erotise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-t-dh-y
|-
! Lemma
| kavatdheyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
